hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or data.get('tool_response', {}).get('filePath', '')
if not f:
    sys.exit(0)
KEY_FILES = ['agent/agent.py', 'agent/tools.py', 'rag/retriever.py', 'rag/indexer.py']
root = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(f), '..')) if '/agent/' in f or '/rag/' in f else ''
if not root:
    sys.exit(0)
rel = os.path.relpath(f, root)
if rel not in KEY_FILES:
    sys.exit(0)
test_path = os.path.join(root, 'tests/test_acceptance.py')
if not os.path.exists(test_path):
    sys.exit(0)
venv_pytest = os.path.join(root, 'venv/bin/pytest')
cmd = [venv_pytest, test_path, '-q', '--tb=short'] if os.path.exists(venv_pytest) else ['python3', '-m', 'pytest', test_path, '-q', '--tb=short']
r = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=root)
out = (r.stdout.strip() or r.stderr.strip() or 'no output')[:2000]
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': 'acceptance tests:\n' + out}}))
"
